creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: danfe
Date: Tue Jul  2 15:24:11 2013
New Revision: 322176
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322176

Log:
  - Add p5-AnyEvent-RPC, abstract framework for RPC clients
  - Remove trailing space in devel/Makefile while I am here
  
  PR:	ports/179747

Added:
  head/devel/p5-AnyEvent-RPC/
  head/devel/p5-AnyEvent-RPC/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/p5-AnyEvent-RPC/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/p5-AnyEvent-RPC/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/p5-AnyEvent-RPC/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/devel/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/Makefile	Tue Jul  2 15:20:21 2013	(r322175)
+++ head/devel/Makefile	Tue Jul  2 15:24:11 2013	(r322176)
@@ -1417,6 +1417,7 @@
     SUBDIR += p5-AnyEvent-Graphite
     SUBDIR += p5-AnyEvent-I3
     SUBDIR += p5-AnyEvent-MessagePack
+    SUBDIR += p5-AnyEvent-RPC
     SUBDIR += p5-AnyEvent-Run
     SUBDIR += p5-AnyEvent-Subprocess
     SUBDIR += p5-AnyMQ
@@ -4398,7 +4399,7 @@
     SUBDIR += trio
     SUBDIR += truc
     SUBDIR += uatraits
-    SUBDIR += uboot-mkimage 
+    SUBDIR += uboot-mkimage
     SUBDIR += uclmmbase
     SUBDIR += ucommon
     SUBDIR += ucpp

Added: head/devel/p5-AnyEvent-RPC/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/p5-AnyEvent-RPC/Makefile	Tue Jul  2 15:24:11 2013	(r322176)
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+# Created by: Anes Mukhametov <anes@anes.su>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	AnyEvent-RPC
+PORTVERSION=	0.05
+CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
+MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
+
+MAINTAINER=	anes@anes.su
+COMMENT=	Abstract framework for RPC clients
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-URI>=0:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-URI \
+		p5-AnyEvent>=5:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-AnyEvent \
+		p5-XML-Hash-LX>=0.05:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-Hash-LX \
+		p5-YAML-Syck>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-YAML-Syck \
+		p5-AnyEvent-HTTP>=1.43:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-AnyEvent-HTTP \
+		p5-libwww>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww \
+		p5-common-sense>=2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-common-sense \
+		p5-Test-NoWarnings>=1.03:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-NoWarnings \
+		p5-Test-TCP>=0.14:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-TCP \
+		p5-lib-abs>=0.90:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-lib-abs
+RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
+
+PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
+MAN3=		AnyEvent::RPC.3 AnyEvent::RPC::Enc::YAML.3 \
+		AnyEvent::RPC::Enc::REST.3
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/devel/p5-AnyEvent-RPC/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/p5-AnyEvent-RPC/distinfo	Tue Jul  2 15:24:11 2013	(r322176)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (AnyEvent-RPC-0.05.tar.gz) = 5d9ddf7df3584010a4a28d9ba0fb4dc3b37ab45f02216c6de800367e9420c94f
+SIZE (AnyEvent-RPC-0.05.tar.gz) = 29663

Added: head/devel/p5-AnyEvent-RPC/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/p5-AnyEvent-RPC/pkg-descr	Tue Jul  2 15:24:11 2013	(r322176)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+Abstract framework for RPC clients.
+
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/AnyEvent-RPC/

Added: head/devel/p5-AnyEvent-RPC/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/p5-AnyEvent-RPC/pkg-plist	Tue Jul  2 15:24:11 2013	(r322176)
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+%%SITE_PERL%%/AnyEvent/RPC/Enc.pm
+%%SITE_PERL%%/AnyEvent/RPC/UA.pm
+%%SITE_PERL%%/AnyEvent/RPC/Enc/REST.pm
+%%SITE_PERL%%/AnyEvent/RPC/Enc/YAML.pm
+%%SITE_PERL%%/AnyEvent/RPC.pm
+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/AnyEvent/RPC/.packlist
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/AnyEvent/RPC
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/AnyEvent
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/AnyEvent/RPC/Enc
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/AnyEvent/RPC
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/AnyEvent
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%
